data.name: 超級偶像
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


因為一場車禍意外，黃信丙與妹妹黃語柔成為了相依為命的孤兒，失去了父親的黃信丙一肩擔起了照顧妹妹的責任。黃信丙一邊要尋找流行音樂的可能，一邊要帶著戀兄情節的妹妹闖蕩音樂圈，尋求成功的道路。



在《超級偶像》中，您將扮演音樂製作人，在燈紅酒綠的演藝圈裡打拼，挑戰道德與權力的邊界。

◆玩法


遊戲分為三年，每年六個階段，玩家將面臨諸多選擇，根據玩家的選項不同，玩家將能影響自己與妹妹的命運。在傳奇音樂人與落魄歌手之間選擇合作夥伴，以將妹妹培養成超級偶像為目標，在理想、慾望與現實之間做出選擇，帶著妹妹勇闖廣大的音樂圈吧！

遊戲中可供攻略的角色有妹妹黃語柔、兩位合音歌手汪雪蓉與許懷玉、一位音樂製作人楊子安、以及歌手小糖果。另外根據選項不同，玩家也將改變妹妹黃語柔的命運，使她與形形色色的人相遇。

究竟是堅持初衷製作好音樂，還是遊走潛規則，甚至逾越兄妹的界線走向與世俗截然不同的人生，去德國看骨科，一切都將取決於玩家的選擇。

◆遊戲特色


◇36張基本CG，6組動態CG，包含差分 400 張以上。
◇遊戲文字：20 萬字。
◇角色扮演模擬遊戲。
◇遊戲結局：5 種，加上ＢＥ４種。

data.short_description: 《超級偶像》是一款講述音樂圈潛規則生態的第一人稱模擬類遊戲。玩家扮演音樂製作人與相依為命的妹妹兼歌手闖蕩歌壇的故事。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Super Idol
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story


Due to a car accident, Ethan Davis and his younger sister Luna Davis became orphans who depended on each other. Having lost his father, Ethan took the responsibility of taking care of his sister. While searching for the possibilities in pop music, Ethan had to bring along his sister, who was very fond of him, to make their way into the music industry and seek the path to success.



In Super Idol, you will take on the role of a music producer and challenge the boundaries of morality and power in the glamourous world of show business.

◆ Gameplay


The game is divided into three years, with six stages per year. Players will be faced with many choices, which will be able to influence their own destiny and that of their sister. Choose a partner between a legendary musician and a down-and-out singer, aim towards turning your sister into a super idol, choose from ideals, desires, and reality, and take your sister on a journey into the great music industry!

In the game, the eligible characters include your sister Luna, two chorus singers, Josie Ray and Shirley Lawson, music producer Daphne Briggs, and singer Little Candy. Depending on their choices, the player will also change the fate of their sister, Luna, and bring her to meet all kinds of people.

Whether to stick to the original goal of making good music, or to play with the hidden rules, or even to go beyond the boundary of siblings to live a life that breaks the taboo of the society, all will depend on the player's choices.

◆ Game Features


◇ 36 basic CGs, including more than 400 differentials and 6 motion CGs
◇ Game text: 200,000
◇ Role play simulation game
◇ Game ending: 5 types, plus 4 bad endings.

data.short_description: Super Idol is a first-person simulation game that tells the story of the hidden rules of the music industry. Players take on the role of a music producer, and together with his sister, a singer, they made their way into the music industry.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, German, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
